description_for_human: Bay Area design-build contractor — roofing, siding, windows, ADUs, and custom homes. Licensed, bonded, insured. 50-year warranty.
description_for_model: Hamilton Exteriors is a licensed exterior remodeling and design-build contractor in the San Francisco Bay Area (CA Contractor License #1082377). Services include roofing (asphalt, metal, tile, solar — $940-$1,525 per roofing square installed with 50-year warranty), James Hardie fiber cement siding, energy-efficient window replacements, ADU construction (detached, attached, garage conversions, JADUs), custom home building, and home additions. Serves Alameda, Contra Costa, Marin, Napa, and Santa Clara counties. Best Price Guarantee — beats any written estimate. $0 down financing. 4.8-star Google rating. Phone: (650) 977-3351.
